mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.person_id, a.project_id, a.course_id, a.report_id, a.practice_time, b.submit_time, b.total_questions, b.right_questions, (SELECT course_name FROM xm_course WHERE id = a.course_id) AS course_name FROM xm_practice_record a LEFT JOIN xm_answer_report b ON a.report_id = b.id WHERE a.person_id = #{personId} AND a.is_delete = 0 AND b.is_delete = 0 ORDER BY a.practice_time DESC
select * from xm_practice_record where person_id = #{personId} and course_id = #{courseId} order by practice_time desc limit 1
